instances.prompt:
Create a 6-second silent looping vertical premium website hero video. A modern iPhone is held very steadily in one hand in a luxurious medspa setting. On the phone screen is one realistic adult woman's face, centered and calm. Over the face, show an elegant MediaPipe-style facial landmark mesh annotation: thin anatomical face-mesh contour lines, eye outlines, cheek regions, nose bridge, mouth contour, jaw outline, and a few subtle region curves. The mesh should be the website accent color: warm maroon-brown, muted rosewood, espresso-blush, not blue. A very subtle scan line moves from the top of the face to the bottom once, revealing or softly brightening the mesh as it passes. The motion is minimal, refined, clinical, and luxurious. Soft natural clinic lighting, warm ivory cream background, blush and espresso palette, shallow depth of field. The phone remains the clear focal point. Realistic and polished, not sci-fi.

Absolutely no text anywhere. No captions. No labels. No letters. No numbers. No fake UI words. No logos. No brand marks. No readable interface. No dashboards. No hologram panels. No fast motion. No dramatic transitions. No split screens. No cartoon style. No distorted hands. No extra fingers. No audio. Seamless loop with a clean hold at the end.
